resources.title: ChatGPT로 이메일·보고서·PPT 10배 빠르게

resources.title: 아침 업무 브리핑 프롬프트 만들기
resources.description: 오늘의 할 일·미팅·우선순위를 AI가 매일 정리해주는 나만의 아침 루틴 프롬프트 제작
resources.command: claude "오늘 할 일: [목록]. 미팅: [시간]. 우선순위 순서와 시간 블록 계획표를 만들어줘"

resources.title: 회의 후 액션아이템 자동 추출
resources.description: 회의 메모나 녹취록을 붙여넣으면 AI가 결정사항·담당자·기한을 표로 정리하는 실습
resources.command: claude "[회의 메모 붙여넣기] → 결정사항, 담당자, 기한을 표로 정리해줘"

quiz.question: What is one benefit of automating repetitive tasks with AI according to the guide?
options: It allows for more complex manual tasks.
It can increase productivity by saving time.
It eliminates the need for any software.
quiz.explanation: Automating repetitive tasks with AI can significantly increase productivity by freeing up time for more important tasks.

quiz.question: Which tool is mentioned for summarizing documents and drafting in Notion?
quiz.explanation: Notion's built-in AI is specifically designed to assist with summarizing documents and drafting content.

quiz.question: How can Zapier and ChatGPT be utilized according to the content?
options: To automate workflows between different applications.
quiz.explanation: Zapier and ChatGPT can be integrated to automate workflows, enhancing efficiency across applications.

practicePrompts.label: Email Summary Automation
practicePrompts.prompt: Summarize the following email: 'Dear team, we have a meeting scheduled for Monday to discuss project updates and deadlines. Please prepare your reports.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Try summarizing a longer email or adding specific points to include.

practicePrompts.label: Meeting Notes Extraction
practicePrompts.instruction: Extract key decisions from meeting notes.
practicePrompts.prompt: Extract key decisions, responsible persons, and deadlines from these notes: 'We decided to launch the project by next month. John will handle the marketing, and Sarah will manage the budget.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Experiment with more complex meeting notes or ask for a different format.

practicePrompts.label: Daily Task Organizer
practicePrompts.instruction: Create a daily task list with AI.
practicePrompts.prompt: Generate a daily task list from these items: 'Prepare presentation, attend team meeting, review budget proposal.'
practicePrompts.followUp: Add priorities or deadlines to see how the task list changes.

evaluation.prompt: Paste your output, command result, or notes here and AI will evaluate whether your learning result matches the lesson goal.

successCriteria: The learner completed a concrete practice step
The result matches the main lesson objective
The learner can explain or verify what happened
commonMistakes: Only reading the lesson without trying the practice step
Posting an incomplete command or partial result
